mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.has_back_login, r.has_back_register, r.has_front_login, r.has_front_register, r.create_time, r.update_time, CASE WHEN r.has_back_login = TRUE AND r.has_front_login = TRUE THEN '前后端通用' WHEN r.has_back_login = TRUE THEN '仅后台' WHEN r.has_front_login = TRUE THEN '仅前端' ELSE '无登录权限' END as permission_description FROM role r
1=1
AND ${ew.sqlSegment.replace('role.', 'r.')}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT id, role_name, has_back_login, has_back_register, has_front_login, has_front_register, create_time, update_time FROM role WHERE role_name = #{roleName}
